mapper.select:
WITH zone_rebalance_stats AS ( SELECT zone_id, AVG(speed_label) AS avg_speed_per_hour, MAX(zone_backlog) AS total_remaining_qty, MAX(batch_id) AS current_batch_id FROM rebalance_snapshots WHERE ts >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) GROUP BY zone_id ), zone_worker_counts AS ( SELECT z.zone_id AS zone_id, COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) AS worker_count FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ), zone_worker_ranks AS ( SELECT zone_id, worker_count, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count ASC) AS rank_low, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY worker_count DESC) AS rank_high, MIN(worker_count) OVER () AS min_worker_count, MAX(worker_count) OVER () AS max_worker_count FROM zone_worker_counts ) SELECT z.zone_id AS zoneId, COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) AS workerCount,
-- Progress Calculation COALESCE( (SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id), 0), 0.0 ) AS progressRate,
-- Status Calculation (Based on AI rebalancing logic) CASE WHEN COALESCE(zwr.worker_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN zwr.max_worker_count > zwr.min_worker_count AND zwr.rank_high = 1 THEN 'STABLE' WHEN zwr.max_worker_count > zwr.min_worker_count AND zwr.rank_low = 1 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN zrs.avg_speed_per_hour IS NULL OR zrs.avg_speed_per_hour = 0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN zrs.total_remaining_qty IS NULL THEN 'STABLE' -- 예상 완료 시간 계산: 현재 시각 + (남은 수량 / 시간당 속도) 시간 -- 안정: 예상 완료 <= 마감 - 60분 (1시간 이전) WHEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL CEIL(zrs.total_remaining_qty / zrs.avg_speed_per_hour * 60) MINUTE) <= DATE_SUB(b.deadline_at, INTERVAL 60 MINUTE) THEN 'STABLE' -- 양호: 마감 - 60분 < 예상 완료 <= 마감 WHEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL CEIL(zrs.total_remaining_qty / zrs.avg_speed_per_hour * 60) MINUTE) <= b.deadline_at THEN 'NORMAL' -- 주의: 예상 완료 > 마감 ELSE 'CRITICAL' END AS status
FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- Join Tasks for Progress Stats LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.zone_id = z.zone_id AND bt.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS', 'UNASSIGNED', 'COMPLETED') LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id
-- Join Rebalance Stats (AI 재배치 데이터) LEFT JOIN zone_rebalance_stats zrs ON zrs.zone_id = z.zone_id LEFT JOIN zone_worker_ranks zwr ON zwr.zone_id = z.zone_id
-- Join Batch for Deadline LEFT JOIN batches b ON b.batch_id = zrs.current_batch_id AND b.status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
GROUP BY z.zone_id, zrs.avg_speed_per_hour, zrs.total_remaining_qty, b.deadline_at, zwr.worker_count, zwr.rank_low, zwr.rank_high, zwr.min_worker_count, zwr.max_worker_count ORDER BY z.zone_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, COALESCE(wc.daily_count, 0) AS workCount, COALESCE(wc.processing_speed, 0.0) AS processingSpeed, COALESCE(wc.progress, 0.0) AS currentTaskProgress, 'WORKING' AS status, 'AVAILABLE' AS webrtcStatus FROM users u INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bt.worker_id, -- Daily Count: Tasks completed today COUNT(CASE WHEN bt.status = 'COMPLETED' AND DATE(bt.completed_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS daily_count, -- Progress: Total done / Total items for current task (SUM(CASE WHEN bti.status = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id), 0) AS progress, -- Speed (Dummy logic for now: 10 items/hour?) 10.0 AS processing_speed FROM batch_tasks bt LEFT JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt.batch_task_id GROUP BY bt.worker_id ) wc ON wc.worker_id = u.user_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId} AND u.role = 'WORKER'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT wl.worker_id) FROM work_logs wl INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = wl.worker_id WHERE wl.ended_at IS NULL AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- WORKER 역할만 필터링 (ADMIN 제외)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM issues WHERE status = 'RESOLVED' AND DATE(resolved_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.assigned_zone_id AS zoneId, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, -- 금일 작업 처리량 (서브쿼리) ( SELECT COUNT(bti.batch_task_item_id) FROM batch_tasks bt_sub JOIN batch_task_items bti ON bti.batch_task_id = bt_sub.batch_task_id WHERE bt_sub.worker_id = u.user_id AND bti.status NOT IN ('PENDING', 'IN_PROGRESS') AND DATE(bti.last_scanned_at) = CURDATE() ) AS todayWorkCount, -- 최근 발생한 이슈 (서브쿼리) ( SELECT issue_type FROM issues WHERE worker_id = u.user_id AND status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS recentIssueType FROM users u -- 활성 작업자 확인 (출근 중) INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- 현재 위치 (진행 중인 작업의 위치) LEFT JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LEFT JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.user_id = #{workerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE zone_assignments SET ended_at = NOW() WHERE worker_id = #{workerId} AND ended_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zone_assignments (worker_id, zone_id, assignment_type, source, started_at, reason) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{zoneId}, 'BASE', 'ADMIN', NOW(), #{reason})
INSERT INTO zone_assignments (worker_id, zone_id, assignment_type, source, started_at, reason) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{zoneId}, #{type}, #{source}, NOW(), #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT line_id AS lineId, line_name AS lineName FROM zone_lines WHERE zone_id = #{zoneId}

SELECT u.user_id AS workerId, u.name AS name, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, zl.location_code AS currentLocationCode, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, bt.started_at, NOW()) >= #{thresholdSeconds} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isBottleneck FROM users u -- 활성 작업자 (출근 중) INNER JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL -- 현재 진행 중인 작업 (위치 파악용) INNER JOIN batch_tasks bt ON bt.worker_id = u.user_id AND bt.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' INNER JOIN zone_locations zl ON zl.location_id = bt.current_location_id WHERE u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId} AND u.role = 'WORKER' -- WORKER 역할만 필터링 (ADMIN 제외)

SELECT u.user_id AS adminId, u.name AS rawName, u.phone_number AS phoneNumber, u.assigned_zone_id AS assignedZoneId,
-- 최신 근무 상태 (Window Function 결과 이용) IFNULL(le.event_type, 'END') AS currentStatus FROM users u
-- 현재 진행 중인 근무 로그 확인 (없으면 퇴근 상태) LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL
-- 최신 이벤트 조인 (ROW_NUMBER 사용, idx_work_log_events_log_time 인덱스 활용) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_log_id, event_type, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY work_log_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC) as rn FROM work_log_events ) le ON wl.work_log_id = le.work_log_id AND le.rn = 1
WHERE u.role = 'ADMIN'
AND u.assigned_zone_id = #{zoneId}
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY u.name ASC

SELECT z.zone_id FROM zones z LEFT JOIN users u ON u.assigned_zone_id = z.zone_id AND u.role = 'WORKER' LEFT JOIN work_logs wl ON wl.worker_id = u.user_id AND wl.ended_at IS NULL GROUP BY z.zone_id ORDER BY COUNT(wl.work_log_id) ASC, z.zone_id ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
